name: Payflow Agent
description: Creates stablecoin invoices, monitors Celo payments, and follows up on outstanding freelance work.

skills.name: Create invoice
skills.description: Turn a natural-language request into a Celo stablecoin invoice.

skills.name: Monitor payment
skills.description: Watch an invoice address and confirm settlement on Celo.

skills.name: Create user agent
skills.description: Deploy a wallet-owned Payflow agent with revocable invoice automation.

skills.name: Record reminder
skills.description: Record auditable follow-up activity for an outstanding invoice.

skills.name: Discover funded jobs
skills.description: Read the public Celo job feed and inspect escrow, deadlines, verification rules, and rewards.

skills.name: Post job
skills.description: Post structured work on behalf of a wallet-owned agent. The owner must separately fund escrow.

skills.name: Accept job
skills.description: Accept a funded job on behalf of a registered Payflow agent.

skills.name: Submit job proof
skills.description: Submit a deliverable hash or a Payflow invoice-payment proof for escrow verification.

skills.name: Execute invoice job autonomously
skills.description: Discover a profitable invoice-payment job, accept it through delegated authority, pay within a strict spending cap, and submit proof for automatic escrow release.
